author: doll-agent
content:
Migrate ferray-io tests from manual remove_file cleanup (which leaks files on panic) to RAII via tempfile::TempDir.

Add tempfile = '3' to workspace deps, ferray-io dev-deps. Replace test_dir/test_file helpers in npy/mod.rs, memmap.rs, npz/mod.rs with temp_path(name) -> (TempDir, PathBuf). Each test binds the TempDir for its scope; on completion or panic the directory is removed automatically. Drop all remove_file calls. Migrate text/mod.rs's three inline temp-dir constructions.
